    Handles enum types in API parameters.

  • 方法详细资料

    • handleSeeEnum

      public static com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass handleSeeEnum(ApiParam param, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaField javaField, ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, boolean jsonRequest, Map<String,String> tagsMap, String jsonFormatValue)
      Handles enum types in API parameters.

      This method is primarily used to process enum types, setting the corresponding parameter type, value, and enumeration information in the ApiParam object. If the enum has a @JsonFormat annotation with a shape attribute value of NUMBER, the value is processed accordingly. Additionally, it supports setting mock values for parameters through tag mappings.

      参数:
      param - The ApiParam object, used to store parameter information.
      javaField - The JavaField object, representing the field of a class, used to obtain the type and other information of the field.
      builder - The ProjectDocConfigBuilder object, used to obtain configuration information for generating documentation.
      jsonRequest - A boolean value indicating whether the request is in JSON format, used to determine how to obtain the enum value.
      tagsMap - A map containing tag names and their descriptions, used to override parameter values with mock data.
      jsonFormatValue - The value of the @JsonFormat annotation's shape attribute, used to handle special cases of numeric enums.
      返回:
      Returns the processed JavaClass object representing the enum, or null if the input field is not an enum.

    • formatMockValue

      public static String formatMockValue(String mock)
      Format mock value
      参数:
      mock - mock value
      返回:
      formatted mock value

    • extractQualifiedName

      public static List<String> extractQualifiedName(List<ApiParam> paramList)
      Extract qualified name from param list
      参数:
      paramList - param list
      返回:
      qualified name list
